title: Russian Delicate Almond Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with delicate almond and russian flavors, a perfect treat for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, milk, Russian tea leaves, and delicate vanilla.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
